_note: Replace this placeholder with the real Tally master export. The Expense Booking tool fetches this file at runtime and sends it to Gemini as grounding context. Keep the keys below; add/remove items freely.

voucherTypes.name: Payment
voucherTypes.use: Cash/Bank-out expense booked at the time of payment

voucherTypes.name: Purchase
voucherTypes.use: Expense booked on credit against a vendor invoice (creates payable)

voucherTypes.name: Journal
voucherTypes.use: Adjustments, accruals, prepaid amortisation, advance settlement

voucherTypes.name: Receipt
voucherTypes.use: Money received (refunds, vendor credit notes received)

policies.indianVendor: Charge GST as Input CGST/SGST (intra-state) or Input IGST (inter-state). Deduct TDS where applicable.
policies.foreignVendor: No Input GST. If service from outside India → reverse charge under RCM. Forex booked at invoice rate; gain/loss on payment.
policies.advance: Advance posted to 'Advance to Vendors' (Loans & Advances). On invoice receipt, knock off via Journal: Dr Expense / Cr Advance to Vendors.
policies.prepaid: Booked to 'Prepaid Expenses' (Asset). Amortise monthly via Journal: Dr Expense / Cr Prepaid Expenses with PRE/ series.
policies.onCredit: Use Purchase voucher with vendor as Sundry Creditor. Pay later via Payment voucher knocking off the bill reference.
policies.rcm: Self-invoice; show output liability under RCM Payable, claim Input GST in next month's GSTR-3B.
